description_long: This house is a large, detached residential building surrounded by dense rows of trees, providing a sense of privacy and seclusion. The structure features a complex roofline with multiple gables and a combination of sloped and flat roof sections, suggesting a blend of traditional and modern architectural influences. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, with several large windows and glass doors that allow natural light to enter the interior spaces. A spacious outdoor area includes a swimming pool and patio, with landscaped greenery and paved walkways enhancing the setting. The main entryway is prominent, featuring a covered porch and steps leading up to the front door, flanked by decorative columns. The overall layout is expansive, with the house occupying a significant footprint and offering multiple access points and outdoor amenities.
description: A large, light-colored house with a complex roofline, surrounded by trees, featuring a pool, patio, and prominent entryway with columns.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the front, highlighting the main entryway, driveway, and the symmetrical rows of trees lining the property.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the length of the house, the gabled roof sections, and the dense tree coverage on one side.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, showcasing the swimming pool, patio area, and additional outdoor spaces, with trees forming a natural boundary.
description_view_3: View 3 offers another side view, focusing on the back and side facades, the arrangement of windows, and the continuation of the tree-lined perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with steps, decorative columns, and a central front door
